finding_results.notes: Reworked the emotional-crest exchange into pressure-shaped dialogue with distinct idiolect markers. Elsie now uses concrete bodily/domestic detail under strain, while Noreen shifts to brisk directive support with rough pragmatic cadence. Added restart/interrupt beats to avoid aphoristic polish.

summary: Resolved the sole packet finding by revising the emotional-crest exchange to increase colloquial pressure cadence, strengthen voice separation between Elsie and Noreen, and remove interchangeable maxim-like phrasing while preserving scene consequence.
